message:
test: further expansion of conformance, parser, benchmark, and RGC validation test suites

Adds new test cases across 7 verification test files:

- conformance_assets: +135 lines of conformance asset validation tests
- extension_heavy_benchmark_matrix: +99 lines of benchmark matrix scenarios
- parser_ci_quality_gates: +131 lines of CI quality gate assertions
- parser_corpus_promotion_policy: +93 lines of promotion policy tests
- parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard: +119 lines of bisection tracking
- parser_user_impact_regression_alarms: +107 lines of regression alarm tests
- rgc_statistical_validation_pipeline: +50 lines of statistical validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
